title: Time Series Component Testing Procedure
description: A flowchart outlining the systematic process for testing and validating the components (trend, seasonality, cyclical, irregular) of a time series.
relationships: Start with Original Data -> Test for Trend -> If present, remove to create De-trended Series -> Test De-trended Series for Seasonality -> If present, remove to create De-seasonalized Series -> Analyze Residual Series for randomness -> Evaluate all Statistical Test Results to confirm component identification
